name: Elemental Transfiguration: Vaporize Blessing
title: Elemental Transfiguration: Vaporize Blessing
desc: When water and fire meet in concord, no venture shall fail.
in_play_description:
Roll Phase: Always roll 2 Hydro Dice and 2 Pyro Dice.
After you trigger Vaporize reaction(s): Discard this card, then choose either Vaporize Blessing: Wild Waves or Vaporize Blessing: Searing Burn and add it to your Hand.

skills.desc:
